allow_instructions: Read-only commands such as listing files, viewing diffs, and checking status are fine.
Do not run linters. Hooks handle them automatically.
Prioritize lean-ctx and fetch MCP. Avoid heavy terminal outputs.
block_instructions: Any command that installs packages (npm install, pip install, go get, etc.).
Destructive git operations: git push, git reset --hard, git clean -f, git rebase, git branch -D.
Commands that use sudo or curl/wget to download executables.
Any command that modifies .env files, credentials, or secrets.
